case_title: PAN-O-RAMA BAKING, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. BRASS KNUCKLE LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF AUG-12-2013 IS CONTINUED TO SEP-09-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-08-2013 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT PER STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO AUG-12-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "JUDGMENT DEBTOR, BRASS KNUCKLE, HAS AGREED TO PAY JUDGMENT CREDITOR, WEEKLY PAYMENTS OF $250.00 BEGINNING JULY 12, 2013. PARTIES HAVE STIPULATED TO CONTINUE MATTER FOR PROGRESS REPORT ON AUGUST 12, 2013. IF NO APPEARANCES, CONTINUE MATTER EVERY MONTH TILL OCTOBER 28, 2013 WHEN DEBT IS PAID IN FULL." PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. BONNIE LAI - OFFICE MANAGER APPEARING ON BEHALF OF PANORAMA BAKING. SHELLIE KITCHEN - OWNER, APPEARING ON BEHALF OF BRASS KNUCKLE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
